titleStmt.title: SII 18.421: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 421. (B.K. No. 139 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated in Śaka 1422, Siddhārthi, Bhādrapada ba. 3, Friday, corresponding to A.D. 1500, September 3. The week-day, however, was Thursday.

It registers a kaul granted by Gāliba-khān who was holding the ṭhāṇā Māmale of Mahamadābād and Tāḷikōṭe, to all the Mahānāḍu, headed by Tammaṇaiya-Chaudhiri of Mahamadābād and others, fixing the amount of taxes to be levied on various professions, products, livestock, etc. The record contains many Persian words.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu sakavaruṣa 1422 neya sidarthi saṁ
vacharada bhadrapeda bahuḷa ta 3 sukra
vāradalu śrī ma(ṁ)nu mahakhādavaṁdu
khāne Ajaṁ mukakhānemōjaṁmu gālibakhānu
ṭhaṇemamale mahamadabādu vā teḷekōṭe
bājimujapati vaḍeyaru mahamudābādiya
taṁmaṁṇaiya caūdhiri nāgiseṭṭi vā pruthuviseṭi boṁmiseṭi vā naḍa
gauḍa cāuḍireḍi vā nagarabeṭada gauḍa basa
vireḍi vā taḷekōṭeya gauḍa maḷiseṭi vā paṭaṇaseṭi
maṁgiseṭi muṁtada grāmanāgrāmada salumuleya sa
masta mahanāḍige koṭa kaulu paṭaṇadali
kaḷuvāḍiya māḍuva Avarige hasige mukupe
ya pālu vecavare sarvvamāpu paṭaṇake mahanāḍige
Avaru ṭeṁkegeruve gāṇavāle modalavarusa māppu
yeraḍane varusa modalāgi sālābādu gāṇavaṁkke sasu
gāṇi Aḍḍahulagi Agākkeyidara Arddha sudēsi pa
radēsige bhūṣake hattakeyeṁṭu dīpāḷige Uḍu
gore bhūṣakke muru sasugāṇi vidaḷakkeṭeṁke . majakū
riyali yeleya hēridare savirakke yeṁṭu ruve A
ḍa . yele Ayivatu . tāḷekōṭe muṁtāda vilāti hasige sa
ripālu . nālvattubāḍa tāḷeyakōṭe muṁtāda vi
lātage . hasige saripālu hāḷu mōḷe ma
sabu mukupe sālābādu . Aḍaviya nēgila
hoḍadare yēḷupālu . caukuḍidu kuḍimappu
vakkala pālavoḷage khaṁḍugakeyikuḷava kuḍa
bēku . yidake dēsa biraḍa Ayina . nallettu
naleṁme . koṭara sāḍaṇige . lājimi . sa
rvamappu . haṭiderige nūrake muru sālābādu .
gaṁgasanāyaka muṁtada kaṁnnaḍa vā (.) marṭheya
rige koṭakaulu . kudure hattakkevaṁbhatara lekha
dali bādu koṭukudure vaṁdakke varaha ye
raḍa koṁḍeU vecasahavāgi taḷavārike
horatu sālābādu . tatsaṁvacharada kārti
ka modalāgi . varusavoṁdake muṁnūru . yeraḍane
varusake (.) Ayinūru . murane varusake Ayinūru . nā
kane varusake (.) horakōṭe tuṁbidare sālābādu kuḍuva sa
vira ṭeṁkeya koḍabēku . yī rokavanu bavaṁnatā
pe kuḍuvadu . jēḍaru kuḍuva maggaderige . muruvaru
sapariyaṁtrau (.) maggavaṁdake varaha vaṁda kuḍabēku .
nākane varusa modalāgi . salabādu varaha yeraḍa ku
ḍabēku . paṭaṇadali tōṭava māḍuva Avarige
hiriya kadurakhanage kuḍuva kaṭubaṇa varusake
tōṭavarutu koṁḍeU . vidaḷake hateṁṭu sudēsi pa
radēsi (.) yī kaula masavaṁṭhige sidhaiyavaḍēra maga sive
nayakavaḍēru hēḷi kuḍisidanu . yī kaulige tapidare (.) tura
kanagali hiṁdunāgali (.) tapida Arasina heḍatiya tulloḷage
Āneyakālu . kateya tale . yetina khōḍu yidariṁda mē
le tapidare Avana heṁḍatiya tulla yī katte ha
ḍali
Digital edition of SII 18.421 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
